scope_1.name: Direct Emissions
scope_1.description: GHG emissions from sources owned or controlled by the reporting entity, including on-site combustion, company vehicles, and fugitive emissions.

scope_2.name: Energy Indirect Emissions
scope_2.description: GHG emissions from the generation of purchased energy consumed by the reporting entity.

methods.location_based: Uses average grid emission factors for the location of consumption
methods.market_based: Uses emission factors from contractual instruments (RECs, PPAs, green tariffs)

scope_3_categories.name: Purchased Goods & Services
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from production of goods and services purchased by the institution.

scope_3_categories.name: Capital Goods
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from production of capital goods purchased by the institution.

scope_3_categories.name: Fuel & Energy Related Activities
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from extraction, production, and transportation of fuels and energy not included in Scope 1 or 2.

scope_3_categories.name: Upstream Transportation & Distribution
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from transportation and distribution of products purchased by the institution.

scope_3_categories.name: Waste Generated in Operations
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from disposal and treatment of waste generated in operations.

scope_3_categories.name: Business Travel
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from transportation of employees for business-related activities.

scope_3_categories.name: Employee Commuting
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from transportation of employees between home and work.

scope_3_categories.name: Upstream Leased Assets
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from operation of assets leased by the institution.

scope_3_categories.name: Downstream Transportation & Distribution
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from transportation and distribution of products sold by the institution.
fi_examples: Delivery of physical documents to clients

scope_3_categories.name: Processing of Sold Products
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from processing of intermediate products sold by the institution.

scope_3_categories.name: Use of Sold Products
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from the use of goods and services sold by the institution.

scope_3_categories.name: End-of-Life Treatment of Sold Products
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from disposal of products sold by the institution.

scope_3_categories.name: Downstream Leased Assets
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions from operation of assets owned by the institution and leased to others.

scope_3_categories.name: Investments
scope_3_categories.description: Emissions associated with the institution's investments and lending activities. This is the PCAF focus category and typically represents 90-99% of a financial institution's total Scope 3 emissions.

key_fact: For financial institutions, Category 15 (Investments) typically accounts for >90% of total Scope 3 emissions, making PCAF implementation the single most impactful action for emissions measurement.
